findings.actual_behavior: PROJECT_STATUS.json still records observed_remote_head, implementation_commit, and github_gates for 286224e while actual HEAD is d44da09.
evidence: git rev-parse HEAD -> d44da0983b38408575ceedfccb00b909862ff9f0
docs/PROJECT_STATUS.json observed_remote_head -> 286224ec29e0a6881ed3a7003db5b63ec3ba233e
docs/PROJECT_STATUS.json github_gates -> runs 27516318293/27516318322 on 286224e
actual final runs observed before audit -> 27516473364/27516473368 on d44da09
findings.expected_behavior: Committed reports must identify the actual audited HEAD and final GitHub run IDs.
findings.impact: A next auditor cannot rely on Git reports alone to reconstruct final provenance.
findings.remediation: Update reports from generated evidence after the final status commit, then re-run CI/security.
reproduction_steps: git rev-parse HEAD -> d44da0983b38408575ceedfccb00b909862ff9f0
docs/PROJECT_STATUS.json observed_remote_head -> 286224ec29e0a6881ed3a7003db5b63ec3ba233e
docs/PROJECT_STATUS.json github_gates -> runs 27516318293/27516318322 on 286224e
actual final runs observed before audit -> 27516473364/27516473368 on d44da09
findings.root_cause: PROJECT_STATUS.json still records observed_remote_head, implementation_commit, and github_gates for 286224e while actual HEAD is d44da09.
verification_required: Re-run independent audit command evidence from a clean checkout.
Verify GitHub CI and security on the remediation commit.

findings.actual_behavior: openclaw doctor warns that state/openclaw.json contains plaintext secret-bearing gateway.auth.token.
evidence: openclaw doctor -> WARNING: openclaw.json contains plaintext secret-bearing config fields
affected path reported by doctor: gateway.auth.token
findings.expected_behavior: Runtime config must keep secret-bearing fields out of plaintext-readable config.
findings.impact: Agents or tools with config read access may expose runtime auth material.
findings.remediation: Migrate gateway token to SecretRef or OpenClaw secret store and verify with deep security audit.
reproduction_steps: openclaw doctor -> WARNING: openclaw.json contains plaintext secret-bearing config fields
affected path reported by doctor: gateway.auth.token
findings.root_cause: openclaw doctor warns that state/openclaw.json contains plaintext secret-bearing gateway.auth.token.
verification_required: Re-run independent audit command evidence from a clean checkout.
Verify GitHub CI and security on the remediation commit.

findings.actual_behavior: Production source exposes only simple MainPlanner and AgentRouter helpers; no executable MAIN runtime loop, result validator, conflict resolver, recovery resume, or idempotent dispatch path was found.
evidence: engine/src/openclaw_super_advisor/main_agent/planner.py has build_plan only
engine/src/openclaw_super_advisor/main_agent/router.py classifies routes by allowlist membership
rg did not identify MAIN result validator or conflict resolver implementation
findings.expected_behavior: MAIN must be a runtime orchestrator with capability-based routing, validation, conflict resolution, max hops, pause/stop/resume, and recovery idempotency.
findings.impact: Blueprint requirements for MAIN runtime behavior are not proven by production code.
findings.remediation: Implement and test the MAIN runtime manager before release-gate consideration.
reproduction_steps: engine/src/openclaw_super_advisor/main_agent/planner.py has build_plan only
engine/src/openclaw_super_advisor/main_agent/router.py classifies routes by allowlist membership
rg did not identify MAIN result validator or conflict resolver implementation
findings.root_cause: Production source exposes only simple MainPlanner and AgentRouter helpers; no executable MAIN runtime loop, result validator, conflict resolver, recovery resume, or idempotent dispatch path was found.
verification_required: Re-run independent audit command evidence from a clean checkout.
Verify GitHub CI and security on the remediation commit.

findings.actual_behavior: TickRecord and BarRecord contain data_quality but no realtime_class field.
evidence: engine/src/openclaw_super_advisor/market_data/schemas.py TickRecord fields omit realtime_class
engine/src/openclaw_super_advisor/market_data/schemas.py BarRecord fields omit realtime_class
workspace/skills/data-provenance-contract requires realtime_class
findings.expected_behavior: All market numerics must carry provenance including realtime_class.
findings.impact: Agents and downstream logic cannot reliably distinguish realtime, stale, unknown, and daily macro data.
findings.remediation: Add realtime_class/provenance to schemas and enforce it in ingestion, storage, and event validation.
reproduction_steps: engine/src/openclaw_super_advisor/market_data/schemas.py TickRecord fields omit realtime_class
engine/src/openclaw_super_advisor/market_data/schemas.py BarRecord fields omit realtime_class
workspace/skills/data-provenance-contract requires realtime_class
findings.root_cause: TickRecord and BarRecord contain data_quality but no realtime_class field.
verification_required: Re-run independent audit command evidence from a clean checkout.
Verify GitHub CI and security on the remediation commit.

findings.actual_behavior: python -m pytest -m "not live" -q --basetemp .\_tmp\audit-pytest fails when .\_tmp does not already exist.
evidence: exact command returned FileNotFoundError for .\_tmp\audit-pytest
after creating .\_tmp in audit clone, the same test selection passed: 197 passed, 1 deselected
findings.expected_behavior: Required audit command must run from clean checkout exactly as specified.
findings.impact: Required validation is not directly reproducible without an undocumented setup step.
findings.remediation: Make the command create its parent temp directory or document and automate the setup in CI/audit scripts.
reproduction_steps: exact command returned FileNotFoundError for .\_tmp\audit-pytest
after creating .\_tmp in audit clone, the same test selection passed: 197 passed, 1 deselected
findings.root_cause: python -m pytest -m "not live" -q --basetemp .\_tmp\audit-pytest fails when .\_tmp does not already exist.
verification_required: Re-run independent audit command evidence from a clean checkout.
Verify GitHub CI and security on the remediation commit.

findings.actual_behavior: Running each subset alone fails the global coverage fail-under gate even when tests pass.
evidence: python -m pytest engine\tests\unit -q -> 155 passed but coverage 87.06 in one run; parallel run demonstrated coverage pollution risk
python -m pytest engine\tests\integration -q -> 36 passed but coverage 76.81, exit 1
python -m pytest engine\tests\security -q -> 6 passed but coverage 21.74, exit 1
findings.expected_behavior: Required unit, integration, and security subset commands should be runnable audit gates.
findings.impact: The required validation list cannot be interpreted unambiguously as independent gates.
findings.remediation: Separate coverage-gated full suite from subset functional gates or combine coverage across subsets.
reproduction_steps: python -m pytest engine\tests\unit -q -> 155 passed but coverage 87.06 in one run; parallel run demonstrated coverage pollution risk
python -m pytest engine\tests\integration -q -> 36 passed but coverage 76.81, exit 1
python -m pytest engine\tests\security -q -> 6 passed but coverage 21.74, exit 1
findings.root_cause: Running each subset alone fails the global coverage fail-under gate even when tests pass.
verification_required: Re-run independent audit command evidence from a clean checkout.
Verify GitHub CI and security on the remediation commit.

findings.actual_behavior: Advisor validator outputs resolved paths to C:\Data\OpenClawSuperAdvisor instead of the isolated clone path, indicating editable-install/root resolution contamination.
evidence: openclaw-advisor validate-agents --strict output paths point to C:\Data\OpenClawSuperAdvisor\state
command was run from C:\Data\OpenClawSuperAdvisor\_audit_workspace
findings.expected_behavior: Clean clone validation must operate on the checkout under audit.
findings.impact: A clean-checkout audit can silently validate the wrong working tree or state directory.
findings.remediation: Require OPENCLAW_ADVISOR_ROOT or reinstall package from the checkout before validators run.
reproduction_steps: openclaw-advisor validate-agents --strict output paths point to C:\Data\OpenClawSuperAdvisor\state
command was run from C:\Data\OpenClawSuperAdvisor\_audit_workspace
findings.root_cause: Advisor validator outputs resolved paths to C:\Data\OpenClawSuperAdvisor instead of the isolated clone path, indicating editable-install/root resolution contamination.
verification_required: Re-run independent audit command evidence from a clean checkout.
Verify GitHub CI and security on the remediation commit.

findings.actual_behavior: openclaw doctor reports missing command owner, message tool unavailable for telegram route, stale/missing session transcript state, and minimal profile policy warnings.
findings.component: OpenClaw doctor and agent tool policy
evidence: openclaw doctor reports command owner not configured
openclaw doctor reports super-advisor routed from telegram but message tool unavailable
openclaw doctor reports recent sessions missing transcripts and orphan transcript file
findings.expected_behavior: Runtime health checks should have no unresolved warnings before pre-production approval.
findings.impact: Operational ownership, Telegram behavior, and forensic session integrity are not release-ready.
findings.remediation: Resolve doctor warnings or explicitly accept them with risk owner and compensating controls.
reproduction_steps: openclaw doctor reports command owner not configured
openclaw doctor reports super-advisor routed from telegram but message tool unavailable
openclaw doctor reports recent sessions missing transcripts and orphan transcript file
findings.root_cause: openclaw doctor reports missing command owner, message tool unavailable for telegram route, stale/missing session transcript state, and minimal profile policy warnings.
verification_required: Re-run independent audit command evidence from a clean checkout.
Verify GitHub CI and security on the remediation commit.

findings.actual_behavior: No FRED_API_KEY/live FRED result was available in audit evidence; Browser plugin bootstrap failed with sandbox ACL before in-app browser E2E could run.
evidence: FRED_API_KEY not configured in committed .env.example and no live credential evidence recorded
Browser plugin node runtime failed: windows sandbox apply deny-read ACLs
script-level UI E2E passed, but browser-plugin E2E was not obtained
findings.expected_behavior: Pre-production PASS requires live FRED validation and browser E2E evidence.
findings.impact: Live data and browser readiness cannot be approved.
findings.remediation: Provide live FRED credential in secure runtime and rerun browser plugin E2E in an environment where the plugin can start.
reproduction_steps: FRED_API_KEY not configured in committed .env.example and no live credential evidence recorded
Browser plugin node runtime failed: windows sandbox apply deny-read ACLs
script-level UI E2E passed, but browser-plugin E2E was not obtained
findings.root_cause: No FRED_API_KEY/live FRED result was available in audit evidence; Browser plugin bootstrap failed with sandbox ACL before in-app browser E2E could run.
verification_required: Re-run independent audit command evidence from a clean checkout.
Verify GitHub CI and security on the remediation commit.

findings.actual_behavior: python -m build generated dist/ and egg-info artifacts in the audit clone.
evidence: git status --short in audit clone after build -> M docs/P2_COVERAGE.json, ?? dist/
findings.expected_behavior: Audit/build commands should not leave untracked generated artifacts unless ignored or cleaned.
findings.impact: Repeated audit runs can accumulate local noise and obscure source changes.
findings.remediation: Update ignore/cleanup policy for generated build and coverage outputs.
reproduction_steps: git status --short in audit clone after build -> M docs/P2_COVERAGE.json, ?? dist/
findings.root_cause: python -m build generated dist/ and egg-info artifacts in the audit clone.
verification_required: Re-run independent audit command evidence from a clean checkout.
Verify GitHub CI and security on the remediation commit.
